query: I need market research on a high-protein, low-prep meal-kit subscription — the customer segment, their pains, and the competition.
Can you do market research on the US premium reusable-coffee-cup space, including the competitive set and addressable market?
Help me research the market for plant-based dairy alternatives — TAM, segments, and key competitors.
I want a domain/industry research report on how the vertical-farming sector is structured.
Produce a technical research report comparing Kafka and RabbitMQ for our event pipeline.
Write the PRD for our new meal-kit product based on the requirements we discussed.
